TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Clarence Brookins sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1946, kinhulan nya ga American, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 193 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 86 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1968 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Philadelphia 76ers. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ¶~ ®laren ¶~ ®e ő≤rookins~…ē s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. kawas~…ē te ****, kinńßulan nja …£a ameri ¶~ ®an, ńßija …£a mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~…ēquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunő≤un kinwa…£iq nja, ** kunkin kin Ēs~…ēuw nja, ńßija …£a qutux nqu s~…ēpzjaŇč ő≤laq na ppzuj mari nő≤a. kawas~…ē **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari …£a, mzjup s~…ēqu te qutux lańßuj ru te ma…£al s~…ēquliq, …£alun nqu pńßila*elpńßia **ers~…ē. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
S.FORM: Clarence Brookins sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1946, kinhulan nya ga American, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 193 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 86 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1968 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Philadelphia 76ers. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
